TC-CR1-010.remark: Schema verified: rate_flag column EXISTS on tx_{est,act}_snap_policy + tx_rig_landing_policy + tx_stg_{est,act}_all_policy. Distribution (est_snap): rate_flag=0 (Unit Rate): 569, rate_flag=1 (Non-Unit Rate): 2. Sample Non-Unit policies: GL346, GL5495. BDR table tx_rig_act_bdr_new_renew has premium_rate_life/premium_rate_add columns but NO dedicated "avg rate" / "rate_calc_type" column — average is likely computed in report layer. In 2025Q4 SUCCESS data, none of the 6 act_hd policies have rate_flag=1 → cannot directly validate average display in BDR. 2025Q4 SUCCESS act_hd: DAI_Grp_Daiichi_Coins(id=113,period=202603,sum_rec=0,due_to=5656338.51); DAI_Grp_Daiichi_Coins(id=508,period=202604,sum_rec=0,due_to=6058834.74); GIB_Grp_Direct_EB(id=126,period=202603,sum_rec=406,due_to=24716581142.26); GIB_Grp_Direct_EB(id=602,period=202605,sum_rec=400,due_to=-616802.90); THREL_Grp_PA(id=104,period=202603,sum_rec=4,due_to=-21887.19); THREL_Grp_PA(id=599,period=202605,sum_rec=1,due_to=302.56)

TC-CR1-011.remark: Layer split structure works: GIB 2025Q4 tx_rig_act_policy_layer shows 3 levels. L1:policies=938,mem_life=151367,sa_life=77166458399.41,nb_prem_life=69290460.00 | L2:policies=938,mem_life=4,sa_life=23770000.00,nb_prem_life=0.00 | L3:policies=938,mem_life=0,sa_life=0.00,nb_prem_life=0.00. Per-member roll-up at tx_rig_act_pol_mem level (with ri_rate, prem_life, prem_acc per member). However Non-Unit Rate per-member calc (Factor Mode × Rate × Extra) with 2-decimal Round per member cannot be directly verified from DB without rate_flag=1 policies in 2025Q4 SUCCESS data (only 2 Non-Unit policies exist in DB and none are in 2025Q4 SUCCESS). Estimate side tx_stg_est_prem_layer: L1:n=445, L2:n=3.

TC-CR1-012.remark: Accident L1 age>70 deduction: Schema supports check — tx_rig_act_pol_mem has age + prem_acc columns (Gibraltar Accident age cap=70 per BRD memory). However tx_rig_act_pol_mem is sparse for 2025Q4 SUCCESS data (only THREL 142 L2 rows; GIB/DAI: 0 rows — member detail likely held in different table or not loaded). Layer-aggregate (GIB 2025Q4): L1 nb_prem_add=11189252.00 ren_prem_add=6739023.80, L2 nb_prem_add=0.00, L3 nb_prem_add=0.00. Can verify deduction relationship at BDR aggregate (l1_ori_nb_prem_add vs total) — requires per-policy walkthrough. Direct member-age check needs UI step or pol_mem repopulation.

TC-CR1-013.remark: Unit Rate regression: 100% of inforce_member rows use rate_type='Unit Rate' on both Estimate side (2401 rows) and Actual side (1 rows). Existing Unit Rate logic flows unchanged for all current policies. rate_flag=0 (Unit Rate) accounts for 569/571 = 99.6% of policies. est_inforce rate_type='Unit Rate':2401 | act_inforce rate_type='null':1, act_inforce rate_type='Unit Rate':2840. 2025Q4 SUCCESS act_hd: DAI_Grp_Daiichi_Coins(id=113,period=202603,sum_rec=0,due_to=5656338.51); DAI_Grp_Daiichi_Coins(id=508,period=202604,sum_rec=0,due_to=6058834.74); GIB_Grp_Direct_EB(id=126,period=202603,sum_rec=406,due_to=24716581142.26); GIB_Grp_Direct_EB(id=602,period=202605,sum_rec=400,due_to=-616802.90); THREL_Grp_PA(id=104,period=202603,sum_rec=4,due_to=-21887.19); THREL_Grp_PA(id=599,period=202605,sum_rec=1,due_to=302.56)
